base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of game_over_screen — a ui (menu_screen) from 1985 super mario bros. Game-over screen — black background with centered 'GAME OVER' text. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Game-over screen — black background with centered 'GAME OVER' text; appears after final life lost; shows player's name in 1P mode or alternates in 2P mode
